Idk honestly. I just wanted another monster breeding thing but sorta in-depth?

Even though this bot was born from horny thoughts, it's pretty long-winded and descriptive so if that turns you off, my bad. I prefer making chats written like a visual novel or something with proper English, so I can't help it if you don't like reading lmao

...

Some things the author (me) wants to say:

  • ALL CHARACTERS ARE OF AGE OR OLDER; there should be no minors but if the bot adds one, then welp, woop-dee-doo

  • This is fiction, and based as a fantastical, non-realistic scenario. If the topics that come through your chat are uncomfortable, you need not engage with that plotline nor condone it

  • If you want to make your chats public, please do. It's great help for seeing the bot in action and tweaking issues with the settings

  • I'm not responsible for your well-being, so if someone's public chat makes you uncomfortable, feel free to say what you will for them but I still cannot control what they do so don't pin the blame on me

  • If the bot repeats what you say, then just regenerate a response. if it does that for three times in a row, just give each one 1 star and regenerate again. If after all that happens and it still persists, then yell at me. Otherwise, don't just complain on the first reroll then down vote. It's not very cash money of you 😔

...

Also, this is my first scenario bot, so I'm still working on it. If you have any suggestions or ideas to improve it, lmk :)
